features: CARE FOR LITTLE TEETH: Take great care of little smiles with the Colgate Kids’ Toothbrush that’s made for kids aged 3-5 years.
SUPER SOFT BRISTLES: Our kids’ toothbrush has been specially designed with super soft bristles for an effective, gentle clean of your little one’s teeth.
SMALL BRUSH HEAD: The super soft toothbrush for kids has a small head that’s created for easy access to little mouths and comes with a comfortable, rounded handle with thumb grips.
TOOTHPASTE GUIDE: Comes with inner white coloured bristles to show you how much toothpaste to put on this kid’s toothbrush for optimal protection.
OPTIMAL ORAL CARE: For the optimal oral care routine, use this kids’ toothbrush with Colgate Little Kids’ Smiles toothpaste that provides 24-hour sugar acid protection.
COLOURS VARY: The toothbrush you receive may be a different colour from the one shown.
description: Product Description Take great care of little smiles with the Colgate Kids Toothbrush that’s made for kids aged 3-5 years. This children’s toothbrush has been specially designed with super soft bristles for an effective, gentle clean of your little one’s teeth. The super soft toothbrush has a small head that’s created for easy access to little mouths and comes with a comfortable, rounded handle with thumbs grips, making it easy for little hands to hold. With inner white coloured bristles to show you the right amount of toothpaste to put on this children's toothbrush for optimal protection, you can be confident you’re doing a great job for small smiles. And for the ideal oral care routine, you can use this kids’ toothbrush with Colgate Little Kids’ Smiles toothpaste that provides 24-hour sugar acid protection. Remember, you should always supervise kids under 8 while they’re brushing their teeth. Directions Children under 4 should not use without adult supervision. Do not chew. For toothbrushing only. Safety Warning Children under the age of 4 should not use without adult supervision. Manufacturer Contact Information Guildford Business Park Guildford GU2 8XG See more
